summary: A local TV news segment (WBNS Channel 10) profiling a single-mother TSA officer named Tatiana working without pay during the DHS shutdown, used by DHS to blame Democrats. It is a reporter-narrated human-interest news package with interview footage, not a music-driven produced spectacle.
notable_text: Tweet: 'Democrats are forcing TSA officers — like single mother of three Tatiana — to work without pay... Democrats must end the DHS shutdown.'
